concept: Players choose a character and navigate a procedurally generated map, engaging in turn-based card battles against enemies by playing attack, skill, and power cards from a dynamically built deck. The core gameplay involves managing energy and card draws to strategically defeat foes, with rules governing card costs, effects, and enemy intentions; after each battle, players choose new cards, remove old ones, or acquire relics that grant passive abilities, constantly evolving their deck.
name: Slay the Spire
